metadata.name: Auspice Seed Rules v1
metadata.purpose: Canonical implementation-ready seed rule dataset for the Auspice MVP: Today view, What Now assistant, week-ahead rhythm planner, basic task matching, and light electional suggestions.
metadata.coreQuestion: Given the quality of time and the shape of my life, what belongs here?
metadata.principle: Move with time, instead of forcing yourself through it.
metadata.productPositioning: Auspice is a rhythm-aware astrological planning assistant, not a productivity optimizer.
metadata.disclaimer: These rules provide symbolic timing support, not deterministic prediction. Practical constraints, user consent, and user capacity override astrological suggestions.

preferredLanguage: a lighter version may fit better

scoringLabels.description: Strong practical fit and strong timing support.
Usable if the task needs to happen, but not especially elegant.
Contains both support and friction; better for a modified or gentler version.
Not ideal for this task type unless practical constraints require it.

electionLevels.description: A low-stakes task that does not need formal electional rigor.
electionLevels.policy: Offer light rhythm matching only. Do not overanalyze.
electionLevels.userFacing: This does not need a perfect election. A supportive window is enough.

electionLevels.description: A task where timing can help, but imperfect timing is fine.
electionLevels.policy: Use planetary hour, Moon condition, local angularity, and user energy to suggest a good fit.
electionLevels.userFacing: This benefits from good timing, but it does not need a formal election.

electionLevels.description: A symbolic start to something that matters, but is not irreversible or life-defining.
electionLevels.policy: Pay stronger attention to Moon condition, task significator, planetary hour, and symbolic start moment.
electionLevels.userFacing: This is worth giving a cleaner start. We can look for a window that fits the kind of beginning this is.

electionLevels.description: A significant event or action where timing could meaningfully shape the tone and outcome.
examples: first client session for new container
electionLevels.policy: Use a stricter electional filter. Avoid VOC Moon when possible. Prioritize Moon condition, significator, angularity, and practical constraints.
electionLevels.userFacing: This is important enough to choose carefully, but the goal is the best available window, not perfection.

electionLevels.description: A major commitment or beginning where formal electional astrology is appropriate.
electionLevels.policy: Use the strictest available electional logic. Eventually include Ascendant ruler, house rulers, dignities, receptions, and outcome house.
electionLevels.userFacing: This deserves a more formal election. We should compare windows carefully and explain tradeoffs.

symbolicStartTypes.description: The action begins when the message or email is actually sent.
symbolicStartTypes.recommendedActionAtTime: Click send at the elected time, with the message already prepared.

symbolicStartTypes.description: The action begins when the first real file or document is created and saved.
symbolicStartTypes.recommendedActionAtTime: Create the document, write the title or first real paragraph, and save it.

symbolicStartTypes.description: The action begins when something becomes public or is scheduled for publication.
symbolicStartTypes.recommendedActionAtTime: Click publish, schedule, or otherwise make the work publicly live at the elected time.

symbolicStartTypes.description: For travel, the symbolic beginning is leaving home or the starting place.
symbolicStartTypes.recommendedActionAtTime: Leave the house or starting location at the elected time.

symbolicStartTypes.description: For contracts, leases, agreements, and legal commitments, the action begins when the document is signed or submitted.
symbolicStartTypes.recommendedActionAtTime: Sign or submit the document at the elected time, after reviewing it beforehand.

symbolicStartTypes.description: For relationships, collaborations, or client containers, the beginning may be the first actual meeting or first formal session.
symbolicStartTypes.recommendedActionAtTime: Begin the call, meeting, or encounter at the elected time if possible.

symbolicStartTypes.description: For projects with fuzzy beginnings, choose the first concrete action that makes it real.
symbolicStartTypes.recommendedActionAtTime: Take one concrete, irreversible-enough action that marks the project as begun.

moon.userFacing: The Moon supports tending, nourishing, responding, and restoring.

mercury.userFacing: Mercury supports naming, sorting, connecting, communicating, and clarifying.

venus.userFacing: Venus supports connection, beauty, ease, relational repair, and aesthetic refinement.

mars.userFacing: Mars can help you move, act, cut through, and protect, but it may be too sharp for delicate exchanges.

jupiter.userFacing: Jupiter supports growth, perspective, teaching, publishing, and larger possibilities.

saturn.userFacing: Saturn supports structure, maintenance, boundaries, patience, and work that benefits from realism.

cautions: forcing visibility when the body wants privacy
sun.userFacing: The Sun supports visibility, confidence, leadership, and bringing something into the open.

moon_void_of_course.userFacing: This is not the cleanest window for beginning something that needs momentum. It may be better for tending what is already in motion, resting, reviewing, or clearing loose ends.

moon_applying_venus.userFacing: This window has more relational and aesthetic support. Good for softening, connecting, beautifying, or making an invitation.

moon_applying_jupiter.userFacing: This window has a more expansive quality. Good for teaching, publishing, outreach, or taking a generous next step, as long as you do not overextend.

moon_applying_mars.userFacing: This window has more heat and urgency. Use it for movement, action, or cutting through avoidance; be careful with reactive communication.

moon_applying_saturn.userFacing: This window may feel heavier or more constrained. It can support discipline, structure, and finishing, but may not be the easiest time for softness or ease.

moon.prompt: What needs care, nourishment, or a gentler rhythm?

mercury.prompt: What needs to be named, written, sorted, or communicated?

venus.prompt: What would become easier if you softened, beautified, or connected?

mars.prompt: What needs courage, movement, or a clean cut?

jupiter.prompt: What wants to grow, be shared, or be understood in a larger frame?

saturn.prompt: What needs structure, patience, or maintenance?

sun.prompt: What needs to be seen, clarified, or led?

writing_study.defaultGentlerVersion: Open the document and make a 20-minute outline or note list.
writing_study.userFacing: This is a good window for sorting ideas, drafting, studying, or making language clearer.

content_recording.defaultGentlerVersion: Draft talking points or record a rough private take without posting.
content_recording.userFacing: This window is better for being seen, speaking clearly, or making something public.

admin_logistics.defaultGentlerVersion: Pick one small admin edge: one email, one bill, one scheduling action.
admin_logistics.userFacing: This is a good window for clearing, sorting, scheduling, or handling the practical edges of things.

client_call.defaultGentlerVersion: Prepare notes or send a thoughtful follow-up rather than opening a new intense exchange.
client_call.userFacing: This window supports conversation, interpretation, and holding a wider frame for someone.

launch_publish.defaultGentlerVersion: Prepare the launch materials, review the page, or schedule the post for a better window.
launch_publish.userFacing: This is more supportive for putting something into motion and letting it be seen.

social_relationship.defaultGentlerVersion: Draft the message, send something simple, or wait for a softer window if the stakes are high.
social_relationship.userFacing: This window is better for softening, connecting, inviting, or repairing than forcing a hard outcome.

ask_request_pitch.defaultGentlerVersion: Draft the ask, clarify the one thing you are requesting, or wait for a more receptive window before sending.
ask_request_pitch.userFacing: This is a request window. Favor clarity, warmth, and the right recipient tone. A supportive Mercury/Venus/Jupiter moment is better than forcing the ask under pressure.

difficult_conversation.defaultGentlerVersion: Clarify the boundary privately, write the message without sending, or decide the one thing that needs to be said.
difficult_conversation.userFacing: This may support clarity and boundary, but keep the scope contained and avoid trying to solve everything at once.

rest_recovery.defaultGentlerVersion: Close loops, dim inputs, take a walk, lie down, or do one nourishing thing.
rest_recovery.userFacing: This is a good window to stop pushing and let the system settle.

home_cleaning.defaultGentlerVersion: Choose one visible surface, one dish cycle, or one 15-minute reset.
home_cleaning.userFacing: This window supports tending the container: home, body, environment, and unfinished practical edges.

travel_departure.defaultGentlerVersion: Prepare, pack, confirm details, or leave for a smaller errand rather than beginning the major trip.
travel_departure.userFacing: For travel, the symbolic beginning is often leaving home or the starting place. A clear, supported departure can set the tone for the journey.

prototypeDemoTasks.title: Go for walk / regulate nervous system
